OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models
articles.excerpt: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project
articles.summary: OpenThoughts-Agent项目探索为通用智能体模型策划训练数据的方法，针对现有SWE-Smith等工作只面向单一基准的局限，提出跨任务泛化的数据配方（Data Recipes），旨在提升智能体语言模型在多种任务上的能力。

articles.title: World Value Models for Robotic Manipulation
articles.excerpt: Generalist value models play a pivotal role in scaling robotic policy learning from large-scale, mixed-quality data. Mathematically, accurate value estimation demands deep temporal understanding, requiring models to both ground the current belief using historical context and plan over future outcomes. However, most existing robotic value models are built on Vision-Language Model (VLM) backbones th
articles.summary: 针对机器人操作中价值估计需要深层时间理解的挑战，提出世界价值模型（World Value Model），利用历史上下文和未来规划进行精准价值评估，克服基于VLM的模型在时间建模上的不足，从大规模混合质量数据中学习策略。

articles.title: CineCap: Structured Reasoning with Spatio-Temporal Anchors for Cinematographic Video Captioning
articles.excerpt: Cinematographic captioning aims to describe how a video is filmed using professional film-language concepts such as camera movement, shot size, depth of field, composition, and shooting angle. This capability is important for fine-grained video understanding and controllable movie-quality video generation, yet remains underexplored in existing multimodal large language models. Unlike question-answ
articles.summary: CineCap提出基于时空锚点（Spatio-Temporal Anchors）的结构化推理方法，用于生成电影摄影级视频描述（包括镜头运动、景深等专业概念），填补多模态大语言模型在细粒度视频理解和可控视频生成方面的空白。

articles.title: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
articles.excerpt: A world model predicts environment dynamics based on current observations and actions, serving as a core cognitive mechanism for reasoning and planning. In this work, we investigate how world modeling based on language models can further push the boundaries of general agents. (i) We first focus on building foundation models for agentic environment simulation. We introduce Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B a
articles.summary: Qwen-AgentWorld探索基于语言模型的世界建模方法，提出Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B模型，用于智能体环境模拟，通过预测环境动态支持推理与规划，推动通用智能体的能力边界。

articles.title: Escaping the Self-Confirmation Trap: An Execute-Distill-Verify Paradigm for Agentic Experience Learning
articles.excerpt: Experience-driven self-evolution is critical for large language model (LLM) agents to improve through open-world interaction. However, existing experience learning methods mostly rely on single-agent loops, where the same agent executes tasks, summarizes outcomes, and determines memory content. This setup makes agents vulnerable to the Self-Confirmation Trap: wrong-but-self-consistent trajectories
articles.summary: 针对智能体经验学习中单循环导致的自我确认陷阱（Self-Confirmation Trap），提出执行-提炼-验证（Execute-Distill-Verify）新范式，通过解耦任务执行、经验总结和验证环节，避免错误但自洽的轨迹固化，提升智能体在开放世界中的自进化质量。

articles.title: Holistic Data Scheduler for LLM Pre-training via Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: The composition of training data, governed by the diversity of sources and their mixing strategy, is a cornerstone of Large Language Model (LLM) pre-training. Online Data Mixing (ODM), the technique of adaptively adjusting data mixtures during training, has emerged as a promising direction to improve efficiency. However, existing methods are constrained by their reliance on a singular optimization
articles.summary: 针对大语言模型预训练中在线数据混合（ODM）依赖单一优化目标的局限，提出Holistic Data Scheduler，采用多目标强化学习自适应调整数据配比，在多样性和效率之间实现更好平衡。

articles.title: ReMMD: Realistic Multilingual Multi-Image Agentic Verification for Multimodal Misinformation Detection
articles.excerpt: Multimodal misinformation detection is increasingly important because viral posts now combine long multilingual narratives, several images, mixed provenance, and subtle text--image framing errors. Existing benchmarks and methods remain poorly matched to this setting: they usually isolate short captions, single images, binary labels, or one manipulation source, while agentic verification remains co
articles.summary: ReMMD针对现有多模态虚假信息检测基准在长多语言叙事、多图像混合来源等方面的不足，提出真实多语言多图像智能体验证框架，通过结构化推理检测文本-图像框架错误，提升复杂场景中的检测能力。

articles.title: Sakana Fugu Technical Report
articles.excerpt: The capabilities of frontier Large Language Models (LLMs) continue to advance, with different providers increasingly specializing in distinct domains. This raises a natural next objective: how to combine the individual specializations of various LLMs into a collectively intelligent system. To this end, we report the development of Sakana Fugu, a family of orchestrator models that harness and ampli
articles.summary: Sakana Fugu报告了一族编排器模型（orchestrator models），旨在将多个在各自领域专业化的前沿大语言模型组合成集体智能系统，通过协同放大各模型优势提升整体性能。

articles.title: ChartWalker: Benchmarking the Cross-Chart RAG Task
articles.excerpt: Cross-Chart Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is critical for complex multi-modal analytical tasks in scientific, business, and political domains. However, existing benchmarks either focus on tables, which are well-structured and textualized, or generate cross-chart questions by simply extracting key points, which often induces lexical overlap between queries and evidence and yields logically i
articles.summary: ChartWalker提出跨图表检索增强生成（Cross-Chart RAG）基准，针对现有基准局限（如仅处理表格、查询与证据间词汇重叠），设计逻辑更复杂的跨图表问答任务，推动多模态分析领域的RAG评估。

articles.title: CoorDex: Coordinating Body and Hand Priors for Continuous Dexterous Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
articles.excerpt: Humanoid loco-manipulation is often simplified into a stop-and-go process: walking to an object, stopping to manipulate it, and then resuming locomotion. It also commonly relies on low degree-of-freedom (DoF) end effectors that behave like an open-close grasp primitive. We introduce CoorDex, a learning pipeline that converts high-dimensional body and dexterous hand control into coordinated latent
articles.summary: CoorDex提出一种学习流水线，将高维身体和灵巧手控制协调为连续潜动作，实现人形机器人行走与灵巧操作的无缝结合，克服传统「停-走」模式和低自由度末端执行器的限制。

articles.title: VeriEvol: Scaling Multimodal Mathematical Reasoning via Verifiable Evol-Instruct
articles.excerpt: Scaling reinforcement learning for visual mathematical reasoning requires more than generating harder questions: as data volume grows, the reward labels themselves must remain reliable. Yet existing data pipelines scale supervision while trusting the labeller, and policy-side methods assume the underlying answers are already correct. We instead treat scaling as a verifiable data-construction probl
articles.summary: VeriEvol提出可验证进化指令（Verifiable Evol-Instruct）方法扩展视觉数学推理的强化学习数据，通过构建可验证的数据生成流程保证奖励标签的可靠性，解决现有方法在数据规模增长时标签质量下降的问题。

articles.title: Self-Compacting Language Model Agents
articles.excerpt: Long agent traces composed of chains of thought and tool calls accumulate stale content that anchor subsequent generations, and eventually outgrow the context window. Existing scaffolds mitigate it with fixed-interval compaction triggered at a token threshold. Such triggers pay no heed to trajectory structure, risking discard of partial results mid-derivation or mid-search. We propose SelfCompact,
articles.summary: SelfCompact提出结构感知的轨迹压缩方法，根据推理树结构选择性地压缩内容，避免固定间隔压缩丢弃未完成的派生或搜索中间结果，从而在有限上下文窗口内保留更多有效信息。

articles.title: The ‘Tibet Aid’ Cadres System as a Mechanism for Political Control in Tibet
articles.excerpt: The system, supposedly meant to aid Tibet, actually serves to sideline local Tibetan personnel while boosting the careers of Han Chinese cadres from other regions.

articles.title: Why Bangladesh Is Fencing Its Border With Myanmar
articles.excerpt: A non-state actor – the Arakan Army – now controls Myanmar’s side of the border. That forces Bangladesh to rely more on unilateral forms of border management.

articles.title: What Will the End of the Iran-US War Mean for Pakistan?
articles.excerpt: Pakistanis are hoping that their role in providing Trump with an offramp to end the war will lead to investment flows.

articles.title: Beijing’s Bullying of Taiwan Threatens Ocean Ecology
articles.excerpt: China managed to secure Taiwan’s exclusion from a Track 2 platform designed to address maritime ecology. It’s a worrying escalation of China’s political warfare.

articles.title: North Korea’s Quiet Campaign to Be a ‘Responsible’ Nuclear Power
articles.excerpt: As U.N. sanctions enforcement fragments, Pyongyang is waging a second contest – over status – that is visible only in the original Korean.

articles.title: How Saudi Arabia Derailed Pakistan’s Africa Drive
articles.excerpt: Pakistan’s aspirations in Africa are growing, but its ability to realize them remains constrained by economic weakness, dependence on external financing, and the shifting priorities of its most important allies.

articles.title: When the Davidson Window Meets the ‘Xi Window’
articles.excerpt: The Davidson Window measures China’s military capability to invade Taiwan. Arguably more important is Xi Jinping’s confidence in his military.

articles.title: South Korea’s Civilian Nuclear Ambitions Clash With Political Realities
articles.excerpt: South Korea’s ruling party failed to secure key races, underlining the need to steer the country’s nuclear future with more than just political momentum.

articles.title: In China, Christianity Is Treated as a Cult
articles.excerpt: The CCP has decided some fundamental tenets of Christianity mark out the world’s largest faith as a cult, and one that needs vigorous suppression.
